language.title: Display Language
language.description: Choose the app's display language. “System default” follows your device language.
language.failed: Couldn't save display language — try again

commit.title: Commit Identity
commit.hint: Name and email written to each git commit. Leave blank to use the default{default}.

ssh.title: SSH Key
ssh.exportConfirm: This will display your private SSH key. Make sure no one is watching. Continue?
ssh.privateVisible: Private key is now visible. Copy it to a safe place and close this screen.

passphrase.title: Passphrase
passphrase.plaintextHint: Your private key is stored in plaintext. Set a passphrase to encrypt it.
passphrase.sshIdentityHint: SSH key identities rely on their own native passphrase protection and are not re-encrypted by gpm.
passphrase.ackRequired: Please acknowledge that this passphrase cannot be recovered.
passphrase.setToast: ✓ Passphrase set — your private key is now encrypted

biometric.title: Biometric Unlock
biometric.unavailable: Biometric unlock isn't available on this device (requires Android 11+ with a fingerprint or face enrolled).
biometric.enableHint: Unlock with fingerprint or face instead of typing your passphrase on every launch.

appLock.title: App Lock
appLock.description: Require biometric every time you open or return to gpm. When on, your app key is sealed behind your fingerprint — the repository can't be opened until you authenticate.

autoUnlock.title: Identity Auto-Unlock
autoUnlock.description: Also unlock your passwords when you unlock the app — one biometric prompt does both. Optional and off by default.
autoUnlock.enabledHint: ✓ Identity unlocks together with the app.

secureScreen.title: Screen capture protection
secureScreen.description: Block screenshots and screen recording on pages that show secrets (setup, create, generate, entry, settings — including the SSH key export). Android only.
secureScreen.onHint: Sensitive pages block capture; the entry list and history stay capturable.
secureScreen.saveFailed: Couldn't save screen-capture setting — try again
secureScreen.blockedToast: Screen capture blocked on sensitive pages

autosync.title: AutoSync
autosync.onHint: Each save pulls, commits, and pushes automatically.
autosync.offHint: Saves stay local until you sync (swipe down on the list). Direct collisions show a resolve prompt; rarely, an edit from an out-of-date view can overwrite a newer change without a prompt — recoverable in git history.

lock.title: Auto-Lock & Auto-Clear
lock.description: Control when the identity locks and how long secrets stay in the clipboard / on screen.
lock.immediateHint: Per-operation: re-authenticate each copy/show/create. Strongest default.
lock.neverHint: Never auto-lock; the identity stays cached until you lock manually.
lock.idleHint: Session: stay unlocked, lock after the idle period.

auth.title: Repository Authenticity
auth.description: Verify SSH-signed commits on every pull to detect a compromised remote feeding validly encrypted but wrong entries.
auth.auditHint: Verify and warn, but always pull.
auth.enforceNeedsKey: Add a trusted signing key before enabling Enforce (it would block every pull).
auth.noTrustedKeys: No trusted keys yet. Trust this repo's signer, paste a key, or import a GPG .asc file below.
auth.gpgWarning: {count} trusted GPG key(s) failed to load — re-add or remove to restore verification.
auth.keyPlaceholder: ssh-ed25519 AAAA… [comment]  — or paste a GPG public key block
auth.pasteKeyPrompt: Paste a signing public key (SSH one-liner or GPG armor)
auth.importGpgPrompt: Label for the imported GPG key? (Leave blank to use the filename.)
auth.trustHeadPrompt:
Trust this repo's current signer?
Enter a label:
auth.trustHeadFailed: HEAD is not SSH-signed — paste a key instead

reset.title: Danger Zone
reset.description: Remove all local data and configuration.
reset.modalBody: This permanently removes every secret, the signing identity, and all configuration from this device. Your passphrase cannot recover a reset store — you would need to set gpm up again.

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.body: You have edits that haven't been saved. Save them before leaving, or discard and leave.
